subject: A monstrous centipede-like insect composed of countless human arms and hands forming its segmented body, crawling across a dim interior floor
description: A horror-fantasy creature shown in a low, ground-level view: a long segmented insect body whose 'legs' are revealed to be dozens of pale human arms and grasping hands. The creature stretches horizontally across the frame with a chitinous head bearing mandibles and antennae. The palette is mostly muted greens, sickly yellows, and bruise-purples with skin-toned hands lit by a dim warm glow from the left. The setting reads as a shadowy indoor room with a wooden or dust-covered floor, suggesting a haunted house interior.
foreground: segmented insect body made of human arms and hands, mandibled head
background: dim shadowy interior, dust haze, faint warm light source
